text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm researching something in the<n>library after
school when Mejiro<n>Ardan walks in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
choice_data_list: You all right? You look dizzy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm fine... Thanks for asking...<n>but you
needn't worry. I'm used to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: More importantly, there's a book I<n>need to find.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, here it is. Volume twenty-eight ofthe Twinkle Series Almanac.
choice_data_list: Wow... Have you read the whole collection?
Wow... Have you read the whole collection?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I started reading these on the<n>days I wasn't
feeling well, and before<n>I knew it, I was hooked.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...My body can't handle a lot of strain,<n>so I
thought I should try to learn more<n>about racing
through its history<n>instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'll do whatever I can... so that one<n>day, I will
leave my mark on racing<n>history.
choice_data_list: You work so hard even when you're not training.
You work so hard even when you're not training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing, really. I just do it<n>because I want
to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, are there any books<n>you would
recommend besides<n>training guides?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I know there's definitely a book<n>that's perfect
for someone with a frail<n>constitution like Mejiro
Ardan. If I<n>recall correctly, the title should be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A cookbook! That sounds wonderful. I<n>would
love some healthy recipes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm actually quite the chef despite my<n>
appearance. ♪ My nanny taught me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'll check it out and start reading it<n>today. I'm
sure I can strengthen my<n>body with the right diet.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan smiles gently and goes<n>off to look
for the book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, interesting... I certainly rest more<n>than the
average person, so knowing<n>the best way to
sleep would be a<n>great help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm glad I asked you. I'll read<n>it straight
away and put its teachings<n>into practice tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Mejiro Ardan's sleep<n>quality will
improve with help from the<n>book. Hopefully that
means her<n>condition will also get a little better.
